problem id: 3683a72b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  00011011 -> 11011000
  11010100 -> 10100001
  00101111 -> 01111000
  11011101 -> 11101001
  11110101 -> 10101001
  00011000 -> 11000000
  00001010 -> 01010000
  00110011 -> 10011000
  10010100 -> 10100001

query: 00100110
predicted answer: 00110000
